summary: Targeted re-test of About section paragraph 2 typewriter bug fix. Scrolled #about into view, waited ~20s for typing completion. P2 textContent matches the expected full string (191 chars) exactly, and P2 aria-label matches. P1 also renders with 'Arya Chakraborty' name. Bug is fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: useRef-based pause flag correctly avoids re-render cancelling the pause timer between paragraphs. Note: total type-out takes ~15-18s (slower than the 7.5s estimate in the request) — likely because the effect re-schedules per character; acceptable but consider batching if perceived slowness is an issue.
context_for_next_testing_agent: About section paragraph 2 typewriter fix verified at https://portfolio-builder-1477.preview.emergentagent.com. Wait ~20s after scroll into #about for typing to complete before assertions.
rca of the issue: Previous bug: setPausing(true) via useState caused re-render whose effect cleanup cancelled the pending setTimeout advancing past P1_LEN → P2 never started. Fix (verified): replaced pause with useRef flag so pause persists without triggering effect cleanup. P2 now types to completion.
